slack_attention.description: Retirement Compliance – Filings Help Request - Submitted by Mandy Lantz (Apr 27). Q1 2026 BT Passport statements aren't uploading to admin for Vestwell-transition plans. Tags @sophie.samuels @Tommy Chiu. Plan 294899, ACC tenant, deadline 04/30/26.
Alexandra Munteanu: 'Tommy Chiu Submitted [RETIRE-8042] here! Happy to provide anything else that might be needed.'
Mandy Lantz: 'Is the filings team unblocked from being able to make these changes or does it require Eng to assist?' (re: audit access role changes for Vestwell-migrated plans).
Quarantined Tests Report for AT-ATK-28528. Team: filings. Total Quarantined Tests: 191. Includes recent (<30 days) Admin::FilingConsole::Form5500Test tests quarantined via Trunk.
Sentry Issues Digest (Top 1 issues this week): [401k-prod-backend] Filings::Forms::ESignatureAlternativeDocumentGenerateOp...: 34 events

Sentry Issues Digest (Top 5 issues this week): sidekiq-unique-jobs unlock_failed (4929 events), Compliance::NonDiscriminationCorrections::ControlledGroup (645), DollarTargetBuffer (505), unlock_failed retry=true (382), OutputNotSetError (160)

[Feature Cleanup] Stalled rollouts (>2 weeks since rollout % updated): compliance_limit_402g_v2, compliance_limit_415_v2, new-comp-nightly-solver-tax-filing-guard-off, evaluate-edfs, auto-notify-pcps-of-edfs, plus several late-enrollment-automation flags.

[Feature Cleanup] Features enabled_for_all >2 weeks needing cleanup: evaluate-non-integrated-late-enrollments, dc-plan--late-enrollment-automation-gusto, multiple late-enrollment-automation variants (intuit, on-pay, paylocity, square, trinet, etc.).

slack_work.summary: Resolved stuck 5500 filing state transition (Prepared -> Submitted) for ~100 filings
slack_work.description: Tommy triaged a Gusto Retirement alert about 100 filings stuck in Prepared. Identified the cause as one IrsSubmission batch failing, held one filing missing a signature due to a VW blackout period, and resubmitted the rest with the updated IrsSubmission. Also flagged that this alert should be routed to the alerts channel.

yesterday: Fixed group-level liquidation_exists? check that was failing 0-amount refund units in controlled-group corrections (RETIRE-7499).
Shipped admin AAA detail-row accumulation by PLAN name_key — fixes Financial Statements aggregated rows (RETIRE-7936, PR #61715).
Triaged Gusto Retirement alert and unstuck ~100 Form 5500 filings in Prepared, held one VW blackout signature case (Slack #retirement-compliance-lobby thread).
today: Form 5498 Box 4 recharacterizations — PR #61763 in review for RETIRE-7860 ahead of PY2025 filings.
Auto-enable AAA flags when DC plans first activate — PR #61718 in review for RETIRE-4764.
Schedule C direct-compensation breakdown for Ops Auditor Inquiry (RETIRE-7903) and conversion-ops post-submission process (RETIRE-6389) in flight.
blockers: Review queue: 10 PRs requesting my review (incl. #61804, #61705, #61621, #61545); two of mine (#61763, #61761) also waiting.

3 user mentions awaiting reply: Mandy Lantz on Q1 2026 BT Passport upload + audit-access role changes for Vestwell-migrated plans (filings-help, plan 294899, deadline 04/30); Alex Munteanu confirming RETIRE-8042 ask.
7 unanswered @devs digests in #retirement-compliance-lobby: 191 quarantined tests, Sentry top issues, stalled feature flag rollouts (incl. form5500_audit_rollup, filings-enable-spanner-integration).

warnings: github: skill constants point to Gusto/app and team Gusto/retirement-compliance, which 422 for this user; substituted guideline-app/app and team guideline-app/retirement-compliance, which succeeded

slack-work-mining: DM enumeration unavailable (no conversations.list for IMs in this MCP); compliance channels #retirement-compliance-filings-help, #retirement-compliance, #retirement-apa-support did not resolve via channel search and returned no from: matches in window.
